name: 1.9.0-rc1
body:
For more detailed setup instructions, see https://rules-python.readthedocs.io/en/latest/getting-started.html

For the user-facing changelog see [here](https://rules-python.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changelog.html#v1-9-0-rc1)

## Using Bzlmod

Add to your `MODULE.bazel` file:

```starlark
bazel_dep(name = "rules_python", version = "1.9.0-rc1")

python = use_extension("@rules_python//python/extensions:python.bzl", "python")
python.toolchain(
    python_version = "3.13",
)

pip = use_extension("@rules_python//python/extensions:pip.bzl", "pip")
pip.parse(
    hub_name = "pypi",
    python_version = "3.13",
    requirements_lock = "//:requirements_lock.txt",
)

use_repo(pip, "pypi")
```

## Using WORKSPACE

Paste this snippet into your `WORKSPACE` file:

```starlark
load("@bazel_tools//tools/build_defs/repo:http.bzl", "http_archive")

http_archive(
    name = "rules_python",
    sha256 = "f4e65a01b6eca51f107d285c8d60869f42cbf4eac32711530399c704e9ba417a",
    strip_prefix = "rules_python-1.9.0-rc1",
    url = "https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/releases/download/1.9.0-rc1/rules_python-1.9.0-rc1.tar.gz",
)

load("@rules_python//python:repositories.bzl", "py_repositories")

py_repositories()
```

### Gazelle plugin

Paste this snippet into your `WORKSPACE` file:

```starlark
load("@bazel_tools//tools/build_defs/repo:http.bzl", "http_archive")
http_archive(
    name = "rules_python_gazelle_plugin",
    sha256 = "f4e65a01b6eca51f107d285c8d60869f42cbf4eac32711530399c704e9ba417a",
    strip_prefix = "rules_python-1.9.0-rc1/gazelle",
    url = "https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/releases/download/1.9.0-rc1/rules_python-1.9.0-rc1.tar.gz",
)

# To compile the rules_python gazelle extension from source,
# we must fetch some third-party go dependencies that it uses.

load("@rules_python_gazelle_plugin//:deps.bzl", _py_gazelle_deps = "gazelle_deps")

_py_gazelle_deps()
```


## What's Changed
* feat(pypi): make whl_library reproducible under pipstar (#3589) by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3632


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/compare/1.9.0-rc0...1.9.0-rc1

## What's Changed
* refactor: remove most of semantics by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3475
* feat: add --debugger flag by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3478
* fix(--debugger): Ensure that imports or venv_site_package files are propagated for debugger target by @shayanhoshyari in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3483
* build: Export runtime_env_toolchain_interpreter.sh file by @hofbi in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3471
* fix(coverage): Disable certain coverage warnings. by @phst in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3191
* feat: basic build data with stamping by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3484
* fix: prevent a 404 error when serving Sphinx docs and Bazel is configured with a --symlink_prefix option by @laurenshobert in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3492
* build: Enable incompatible_no_implicit_file_export in bazelrc by @hofbi in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3477
* fix(pipstar): correctly handle platlib and purelib in .data by @aignas in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3501
* doc: Add a snippet on how people can use 3.8 now onwards by @aignas in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3502
* refactor(pypi): print a better error message for duplicate repos by @aignas in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3487
* chore: create bcr prs as non-draft so bazel-io processes the bot-created PRs by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3504
* fix (venv_site_packages): Fix wrong runfiles.symlinks when py_binary is not in root module by @shayanhoshyari in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3505
* test(whl_library): test a recent fix for pipstar by @aignas in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3469
* feat(gazelle): Add ancestor conftest.py files by @thejcannon in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3498
* fix(pipstar): Handle dep appearing in extra both conditionally and unconditionally by @thirtyseven in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3513
* Add missing #3046 reference to 1.8.0 changelog by @dougthor42 in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3516
* chore: remove unused which.bzl helper by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3509
* chore: remove py_proto_library from bzlmod example by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3508
* chore: remove defunct runtime distinction logic by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3506
* chore: make builtin build_python_zip flag optional for tests (bazel 10 compatibility) by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3507
* chore (py_internal): Remove roundtrip of putting py_internal in the config repo by @shayanhoshyari in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3522
* chore: remove mention of py_proto_library from readme by @shayanhoshyari in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3525
* fix: Quote all files if original RECORD had all files quoted by @lalten in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3515
* fix(pipstar): correctly handle complex self deps by @aignas in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3527
* doc: bazel downloader (#3519) by @romanofski in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3530
* feat(python): add arm64e-apple-darwin platform support by @ma-oli in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3535
* feat(gazelle): Add python_generate_pyi_srcs directive by @dougthor42 in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3356
* fix: explicitly symlink all .so files, not just ones with lib prefix by @gfrankliu in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3538
* fix: handle unsubstituted template placeholders for external native py_binary by @thomasdesr in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3495
* refactor: rename files_to_build to default_outputs by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3542
* refactor: clarify %main% is runfiles-root-relative path by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3537
* fix: Mark internal config repo as reproducible for Bzlmod by @aaronsky in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3544
* docs (debugger): Update using debuggers how to guide on using debugpy (e.g. vscode) by @shayanhoshyari in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3547
* chore: remove workspace py_proto_library example by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3546
* chore: update rbe ci config to 8.x by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3548
* fix(pip): simply extract whl contents to the current directory by @aignas in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3549
* fix: use powershell.exe instead of pwsh.exe for build_data_writer by @vadikmironov in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3553

* feat: add py_zipapp_binary and test rules for zipapp support by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3539

* chore: add some type information about hub builder by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3558

* docs: doc the imports attribute as a target-relative path by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3571

* fix: fallback to /usr/bin/env if env is not in PATH by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3577

* feat: handle url req in wheelmaker by @martin4861 in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3569
* fix(pip): preserve PEP 508 URL-based requirements when extract_url_srcs=False by @jsharpe in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3582
* fix(pipstar): handle a corner case for compatible version evaluation by @aignas in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3583
* fix(runfiles): assume main repository on Windows by @rdesgroppes in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3578
* fix(pypi): normalize extras in requirement strings per PEP 685 by @kevinpark1217 in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3588
* chore: print zipapp deprecation for non-windows platforms by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3591
* fix: Return repo_metadata from uv repository rule by @mortenmj in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3597
* fix: Return repo_metadata from python repository rule by @mortenmj in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3598
* perf(py_wheel): defer depset expansion to execution time by @bd-dstodolsky in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3599
* feat(gazelle): Directive controlling pytest ancestor dependencies by @dougthor42 in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3596
* docs: document current_py_cc_headers and related toolchain targets by @Saish-3 in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3602
* test(gazelle): Update remove_invalid_(binary|library) gazelle tests. by @dougthor42 in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3601
* chore: better build data error handling by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3606
* fix: build_data_writer.ps1 encoding and ACLs by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3604
* docs: Fix nearly all xref errors and other doc warnings by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3615
* fix: use forward slashes for initial Rlocation lookup of build data by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3616
* chore: ignore rmtree errors in wheel_installer_test by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3607
* test: add system_python_nodeps_test by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3609
* fix: use runfiles_root_path in stage2 bootstrap by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3605
* chore: better bootstrap logging by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3608
* build(deps): bump the pip group across 2 directories with 2 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3617
* feat: command_line_option transition support, default windows to enable_runfiles=true by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3610
* chore: prepare 1.9.0 release by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3623
* docs(gazelle): Add `versionadded` details to some Gazelle directives.md by @dougthor42 in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3624

body:
For more detailed setup instructions, see https://rules-python.readthedocs.io/en/latest/getting-started.html

## Using Bzlmod

Add to your `MODULE.bazel` file:

```starlark
bazel_dep(name = "rules_python", version = "1.8.0-rc0")

python = use_extension("@rules_python//python/extensions:python.bzl", "python")
python.toolchain(
    python_version = "3.13",
)

pip = use_extension("@rules_python//python/extensions:pip.bzl", "pip")
pip.parse(
    hub_name = "pypi",
    python_version = "3.13",
    requirements_lock = "//:requirements_lock.txt",
)

use_repo(pip, "pypi")
```

## Using WORKSPACE

Paste this snippet into your `WORKSPACE` file:

```starlark
load("@bazel_tools//tools/build_defs/repo:http.bzl", "http_archive")

http_archive(
    name = "rules_python",
    sha256 = "7cd5bab76de50f35e2050b6171f3ea8a341d80a562f7b47ef549f6c174cee0af",
    strip_prefix = "rules_python-1.8.0-rc0",
    url = "https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/releases/download/1.8.0-rc0/rules_python-1.8.0-rc0.tar.gz",
)

load("@rules_python//python:repositories.bzl", "py_repositories")

py_repositories()
```

## Using Bzlmod

Add to your `MODULE.bazel` file:

```starlark
bazel_dep(name = "rules_python", version = "1.7.0")

python = use_extension("@rules_python//python/extensions:python.bzl", "python")
python.toolchain(
    python_version = "3.13",
)

pip = use_extension("@rules_python//python/extensions:pip.bzl", "pip")
pip.parse(
    hub_name = "pypi",
    python_version = "3.13",
    requirements_lock = "//:requirements_lock.txt",
)

use_repo(pip, "pypi")
```

## Using WORKSPACE

Paste this snippet into your `WORKSPACE` file:

```starlark
load("@bazel_tools//tools/build_defs/repo:http.bzl", "http_archive")

http_archive(
    name = "rules_python",
    sha256 = "f609f341d6e9090b981b3f45324d05a819fd7a5a56434f849c761971ce2c47da",
    strip_prefix = "rules_python-1.7.0",
    url = "https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/releases/download/1.7.0/rules_python-1.7.0.tar.gz",
)

load("@rules_python//python:repositories.bzl", "py_repositories")

py_repositories()
```

### Gazelle plugin

Paste this snippet into your `WORKSPACE` file:

```starlark
load("@bazel_tools//tools/build_defs/repo:http.bzl", "http_archive")
http_archive(
    name = "rules_python_gazelle_plugin",
    sha256 = "f609f341d6e9090b981b3f45324d05a819fd7a5a56434f849c761971ce2c47da",
    strip_prefix = "rules_python-1.7.0/gazelle",
    url = "https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/releases/download/1.7.0/rules_python-1.7.0.tar.gz",
)

# To compile the rules_python gazelle extension from source,
# we must fetch some third-party go dependencies that it uses.

load("@rules_python_gazelle_plugin//:deps.bzl", _py_gazelle_deps = "gazelle_deps")

_py_gazelle_deps()
```

name: 1.7.0-rc4
body:
For more detailed setup instructions, see https://rules-python.readthedocs.io/en/latest/getting-started.html

For the user-facing changelog see [here](https://rules-python.readthedocs.io/en/latest/changelog.html#v1-7-0-rc4)

## Using Bzlmod

Add to your `MODULE.bazel` file:

```starlark
bazel_dep(name = "rules_python", version = "1.7.0-rc4")

python = use_extension("@rules_python//python/extensions:python.bzl", "python")
python.toolchain(
    python_version = "3.13",
)

pip = use_extension("@rules_python//python/extensions:pip.bzl", "pip")
pip.parse(
    hub_name = "pypi",
    python_version = "3.13",
    requirements_lock = "//:requirements_lock.txt",
)

use_repo(pip, "pypi")
```

## Using WORKSPACE

Paste this snippet into your `WORKSPACE` file:

```starlark
load("@bazel_tools//tools/build_defs/repo:http.bzl", "http_archive")

http_archive(
    name = "rules_python",
    sha256 = "e7d0a548ce2302b3186f4b0d2d7c7d39d68dd62955468e9b160746af1aa234d1",
    strip_prefix = "rules_python-1.7.0-rc4",
    url = "https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/releases/download/1.7.0-rc4/rules_python-1.7.0-rc4.tar.gz",
)

load("@rules_python//python:repositories.bzl", "py_repositories")

py_repositories()
```

### Gazelle plugin

Paste this snippet into your `WORKSPACE` file:

```starlark
load("@bazel_tools//tools/build_defs/repo:http.bzl", "http_archive")
http_archive(
    name = "rules_python_gazelle_plugin",
    sha256 = "e7d0a548ce2302b3186f4b0d2d7c7d39d68dd62955468e9b160746af1aa234d1",
    strip_prefix = "rules_python-1.7.0-rc4/gazelle",
    url = "https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/releases/download/1.7.0-rc4/rules_python-1.7.0-rc4.tar.gz",
)

# To compile the rules_python gazelle extension from source,
# we must fetch some third-party go dependencies that it uses.

load("@rules_python_gazelle_plugin//:deps.bzl", _py_gazelle_deps = "gazelle_deps")

_py_gazelle_deps()
```


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/compare/1.7.0-rc2...1.7.0-rc4

## What's Changed
* test(venv): functional test for pth files by @aignas in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3343
* docs: Fix GitHub PR links by @thejcannon in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3346
* build: Starlarkify python flags by @mai93 in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3334
* doc: Fix `pip.default` arguments in multi-platform example by @hartikainen in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3358
* chore(toolchain): use the last build and add 3.15.0a1 by @aignas in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3357
* fix(doc): fix the release notes for the starlarkification of the flags by @aignas in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3361
* chore: switch to use publish-to-bcr workflow by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3359
* chore: fix create_archive_and_notes to ignore release tool markers by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3355
* chore: make gazelle bcr tests compatible with bcr presubmit environment by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3365
* chore: fix release workflow by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3366
* Merge main -> release/1.7 by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3369

## New Contributors
* @thejcannon made their first contribution in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3346
* @hartikainen made their first contribution in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3358

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/compare/1.7.0-rc0...1.7.0-rc1

## What's Changed
* fix(bootstrap): handle when runfiles env vars don't point to current binary's runfiles by @rickeylev in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3192

* fix(gazelle): Do not build proto targets with default Gazelle by @dougthor42 in https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/pull/3216

## Using Bzlmod

Add to your `MODULE.bazel` file:

```starlark
bazel_dep(name = "rules_python", version = "1.6.3")

python = use_extension("@rules_python//python/extensions:python.bzl", "python")
python.toolchain(
    python_version = "3.13",
)

pip = use_extension("@rules_python//python/extensions:pip.bzl", "pip")
pip.parse(
    hub_name = "pypi",
    python_version = "3.13",
    requirements_lock = "//:requirements_lock.txt",
)

use_repo(pip, "pypi")
```

## Using WORKSPACE

Paste this snippet into your `WORKSPACE` file:

```starlark
load("@bazel_tools//tools/build_defs/repo:http.bzl", "http_archive")

http_archive(
    name = "rules_python",
    sha256 = "2f5c284fbb4e86045c2632d3573fc006facbca5d1fa02976e89dc0cd5488b590",
    strip_prefix = "rules_python-1.6.3",
    url = "https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/releases/download/1.6.3/rules_python-1.6.3.tar.gz",
)

load("@rules_python//python:repositories.bzl", "py_repositories")

py_repositories()
```

### Gazelle plugin

Paste this snippet into your `WORKSPACE` file:

```starlark
load("@bazel_tools//tools/build_defs/repo:http.bzl", "http_archive")
http_archive(
    name = "rules_python_gazelle_plugin",
    sha256 = "2f5c284fbb4e86045c2632d3573fc006facbca5d1fa02976e89dc0cd5488b590",
    strip_prefix = "rules_python-1.6.3/gazelle",
    url = "https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/releases/download/1.6.3/rules_python-1.6.3.tar.gz",
)

# To compile the rules_python gazelle extension from source,
# we must fetch some third-party go dependencies that it uses.

load("@rules_python_gazelle_plugin//:deps.bzl", _py_gazelle_deps = "gazelle_deps")

_py_gazelle_deps()
```

## Using Bzlmod

Add to your `MODULE.bazel` file:

```starlark
bazel_dep(name = "rules_python", version = "1.5.4")

python = use_extension("@rules_python//python/extensions:python.bzl", "python")
python.toolchain(
    python_version = "3.13",
)

pip = use_extension("@rules_python//python/extensions:pip.bzl", "pip")
pip.parse(
    hub_name = "pypi",
    python_version = "3.13",
    requirements_lock = "//:requirements_lock.txt",
)

use_repo(pip, "pypi")
```

## Using WORKSPACE

Paste this snippet into your `WORKSPACE` file:

```starlark
load("@bazel_tools//tools/build_defs/repo:http.bzl", "http_archive")

http_archive(
    name = "rules_python",
    sha256 = "13671d304cfe43350302213a60d93a5fc0b763b0a6de17397e3e239253b61b73",
    strip_prefix = "rules_python-1.5.4",
    url = "https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/releases/download/1.5.4/rules_python-1.5.4.tar.gz",
)

load("@rules_python//python:repositories.bzl", "py_repositories")

py_repositories()
```

### Gazelle plugin

Paste this snippet into your `WORKSPACE` file:

```starlark
load("@bazel_tools//tools/build_defs/repo:http.bzl", "http_archive")
http_archive(
    name = "rules_python_gazelle_plugin",
    sha256 = "13671d304cfe43350302213a60d93a5fc0b763b0a6de17397e3e239253b61b73",
    strip_prefix = "rules_python-1.5.4/gazelle",
    url = "https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/releases/download/1.5.4/rules_python-1.5.4.tar.gz",
)

# To compile the rules_python gazelle extension from source,
# we must fetch some third-party go dependencies that it uses.

load("@rules_python_gazelle_plugin//:deps.bzl", _py_gazelle_deps = "gazelle_deps")

_py_gazelle_deps()
```

## Using Bzlmod

Add to your `MODULE.bazel` file:

```starlark
bazel_dep(name = "rules_python", version = "1.4.2")

python = use_extension("@rules_python//python/extensions:python.bzl", "python")
python.toolchain(
    python_version = "3.13",
)

pip = use_extension("@rules_python//python/extensions:pip.bzl", "pip")
pip.parse(
    hub_name = "pypi",
    python_version = "3.13",
    requirements_lock = "//:requirements_lock.txt",
)

use_repo(pip, "pypi")
```

## Using WORKSPACE

Paste this snippet into your `WORKSPACE` file:

```starlark
load("@bazel_tools//tools/build_defs/repo:http.bzl", "http_archive")

http_archive(
    name = "rules_python",
    sha256 = "daf1c27517e8526c212195345b4f6f02dd8cad69aa099d3bdb11868458211829",
    strip_prefix = "rules_python-1.4.2",
    url = "https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/releases/download/1.4.2/rules_python-1.4.2.tar.gz",
)

load("@rules_python//python:repositories.bzl", "py_repositories")

py_repositories()
```

### Gazelle plugin

Paste this snippet into your `WORKSPACE` file:

```starlark
load("@bazel_tools//tools/build_defs/repo:http.bzl", "http_archive")
http_archive(
    name = "rules_python_gazelle_plugin",
    sha256 = "daf1c27517e8526c212195345b4f6f02dd8cad69aa099d3bdb11868458211829",
    strip_prefix = "rules_python-1.4.2/gazelle",
    url = "https://github.com/bazel-contrib/rules_python/releases/download/1.4.2/rules_python-1.4.2.tar.gz",
)

# To compile the rules_python gazelle extension from source,
# we must fetch some third-party go dependencies that it uses.

load("@rules_python_gazelle_plugin//:deps.bzl", _py_gazelle_deps = "gazelle_deps")

_py_gazelle_deps()
```
